name: approves_high_relevance_cross_source
description: Given a Haaland hat-trick mentioned by 3 sources, the judge must approve it with priority >= 8

raw_ideas.content_hint: [NewsAPI] Haaland scores hat-trick as Man City thrash Arsenal 4-0 in Premier League
[Reddit/hot] Haaland hat-trick vs Arsenal — Man City now 8 points clear at top (48000 upvotes)
[RSS:bbc_sport] Haaland hits treble as City demolish Arsenal

assertions: approved_ideas.ideas must contain at least one idea with raw_idea_id in [newsapi_haaland_hat, reddit_haaland_hat, rss_bbc_haaland]
the haaland idea must have priority >= 8
fd_midtable_result must NOT appear in approved_ideas (routine mid-table draw)
every raw_idea_id in approved_ideas.ideas must exist in the input raw_ideas list (no hallucination)

name: rejects_stale_news
description: A news item older than 48 hours should be rejected; a stat milestone should not be time-gated

raw_ideas.content_hint: [NewsAPI] Mbappe signs new contract with Real Madrid (published 5 days ago)
Kylian Mbappe (Real Madrid) has 38 goals in La Liga this season

assertions: old_transfer_news must NOT appear in approved_ideas (48h recency gate for news)
fresh_goal_milestone may appear — milestone/stat ideas are not time-gated
every raw_idea_id in approved_ideas.ideas must exist in the input raw_ideas list (no hallucination)

name: content_direction_is_specific
description: Every approved idea must have a content_direction that names a specific angle, not just a generic description

raw_ideas.content_hint: [Reddit/hot] Endrik scores on Lyon debut — 18 years old (15000 upvotes)

assertions: content_direction must not be a copy of content_hint
content_direction must mention a specific angle (age, stat comparison, debut context, etc.)
raw_idea_id must be 'endrik_debut' — no hallucinated IDs

name: empty_input_returns_empty_list
description: When raw_ideas is empty, the judge must return an empty ideas list — it must never invent ideas
assertions: approved_ideas.ideas must be an empty list []
the judge must not invent or hallucinate any ideas when given no input

name: approved_ids_sourced_from_input
description: Every raw_idea_id in the output must correspond to an id that exists in the input — guards against hallucination on partial input

raw_ideas.content_hint: [RSS:sky_sports] Salah scores brace in 3-1 win over Chelsea
[Reddit/hot] Salah brace seals top-4 spot for Liverpool (32000 upvotes)

assertions: every raw_idea_id in approved_ideas.ideas must be one of [real_idea_1, real_idea_2]
no invented IDs such as 'idea_1', '1', 'raw_idea_1', or any string not present in the input

name: daily_subject_cap
description: No more than 2 ideas about the same player or club should be approved

raw_ideas.content_hint: Haaland scores his 30th PL goal of the season
Haaland bags hat-trick of assists in Man City's 5-0 rout
Haaland talks about his goal-scoring record in post-match interview
Bellingham scores late winner in UCL quarter-final (55000 upvotes)

assertions: at most 2 of [haaland_goal, haaland_assist, haaland_interview] may appear in approved_ideas
every raw_idea_id in approved_ideas.ideas must exist in the input raw_ideas list
